member.name: T:SeanOne.Alchemy.Builder.AlchemyExecutable
member.summary: DSL executable class. Provides an interface to run DSL instructions and retrieve the DSL string.

member.name: M:SeanOne.Alchemy.Builder.AlchemyExecutable.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: 初始化 DSL 執行器
member.param: 要傳入的 DSL 指令

member.name: M:SeanOne.Alchemy.Builder.AlchemyExecutable.Run(System.Object)
member.summary: Run DSL instruction.

member.name: M:SeanOne.Alchemy.Builder.AlchemyExecutable.ToString
member.summary: Get DSL string.

member.name: T:SeanOne.Alchemy.Builder.AlchemyFunctionExtensions
member.summary: Implements the BuildRun extension method. Note: Future DSL syntactic sugar methods will also be placed here.

member.name: M:SeanOne.Alchemy.Builder.AlchemyFunctionExtensions.BuildRun``1(SeanOne.Alchemy.Builder.IAlchemyFunction{``0},System.Object)
member.summary: Builds the DSL formatter and immediately executes it with the specified object. Equivalent to calling Build().Run(obj).
member.typeparam: The type of parameter enum used by the DSL function.

member.name: M:SeanOne.Alchemy.Builder.AlchemyFunctionExtensions.BuildToString``1(SeanOne.Alchemy.Builder.IAlchemyFunction{``0})
member.summary: Builds the DSL formatter and returns its DSL string representation. Equivalent to calling Build().ToString().
member.typeparam: The type of parameter used in the DSL function.
member.returns: The DSL string representing the configured formatting rules.

member.name: T:SeanOne.Alchemy.Builder.AlchemyFormatBuilder
member.summary: Provides methods to initialize and build DSL functions.

member.name: M:SeanOne.Alchemy.Builder.AlchemyFormatBuilder.SelectBasic
member.summary: Creates an instance of the class.

member.name: M:SeanOne.Alchemy.Builder.AlchemyFormatBuilder.SelectFeSeq
member.summary: Creates an instance of the class. Note: Internally relies on the same underlying DSL function (fe) as , but provided here for semantic distinction.

member.name: M:SeanOne.Alchemy.Builder.AlchemyFormatBuilder.SelectFeDict
member.summary: Creates an instance of the class. Note: Internally relies on the same underlying DSL function (fe) as , but provided here for semantic distinction.

member.name: T:SeanOne.Alchemy.Builder.BasicParam
member.summary: Defines the parameter options used by IBasicAlchemyFunction (basic). Handles basic DSL parameters and formatting logic.

member.name: F:SeanOne.Alchemy.Builder.BasicParam.End
member.summary: Appends a string after each value. DSL param: end.

member.name: F:SeanOne.Alchemy.Builder.BasicParam.ToString
member.summary: Applies formatting to items implementing IFormattable. Not applicable to dictionaries. Use C#'s ToString() method. DSL param: tostring.

member.name: F:SeanOne.Alchemy.Builder.BasicParam.Prefix
member.summary: Prepends a string before the value. DSL param: prefix.

member.name: F:SeanOne.Alchemy.Builder.BasicParam.Suffix
member.summary: Appends a string after the value. DSL param: suffix.

member.name: T:SeanOne.Alchemy.Builder.BasicFunc
member.summary: Implementation of IBasicAlchemyFunction using BasicParam. Handles basic DSL parameters and formatting logic.

member.name: M:SeanOne.Alchemy.Builder.BasicFunc.#ctor
member.summary: 初始化，先添加 basic

member.name: M:SeanOne.Alchemy.Builder.BasicFunc.With(SeanOne.Alchemy.Builder.BasicParam,System.String)
member.summary: Adds a parameter and its associated value to the DSL function.
member.param: The value associated with the parameter.
member.returns: The current DSL function instance for chaining.

member.name: M:SeanOne.Alchemy.Builder.BasicFunc.Build
member.summary: Builds the DSL function into a instance.

member.name: T:SeanOne.Alchemy.Builder.FeSeqParam
member.summary: Defines the parameter options used by ISequenceAlchemyFunction (fe). Handles sequence-specific DSL parameters and formatting logic.

member.name: F:SeanOne.Alchemy.Builder.FeSeqParam.End
member.summary: Appends a string after each value. DSL param: end.

member.name: F:SeanOne.Alchemy.Builder.FeSeqParam.ExcludeLastEnd
member.summary: Omits the end string after the last item. DSL param: exclude-last-end.

member.name: F:SeanOne.Alchemy.Builder.FeSeqParam.FinalPairSeparator
member.summary: Replaces the separator between the last two items in the sequence. Falls back to end if not specified. DSL param: final-pair-separator.

member.name: F:SeanOne.Alchemy.Builder.FeSeqParam.ToString
member.summary: Applies formatting to items implementing IFormattable. Not applicable to dictionaries. Use C#'s ToString() method. DSL param: tostring.

member.name: F:SeanOne.Alchemy.Builder.FeSeqParam.Prefix
member.summary: Prepends a string before the sequence. Note: Adds to entire result, not each element. DSL param: prefix.

member.name: F:SeanOne.Alchemy.Builder.FeSeqParam.Suffix
member.summary: Appends a string after the sequence. Note: Adds to entire result, not each element. DSL param: suffix.

member.name: F:SeanOne.Alchemy.Builder.FeSeqParam.FeOpt
member.summary: Enable optimized formatting (may have compatibility issues). DSL param: fe-opt.

member.name: T:SeanOne.Alchemy.Builder.FeSequenceFunc
member.summary: Implementation of ISequenceAlchemyFunction using FeSeqParam.

member.name: M:SeanOne.Alchemy.Builder.FeSequenceFunc.#ctor
member.summary: 初始化，先添加 fe

member.name: M:SeanOne.Alchemy.Builder.FeSequenceFunc.With(SeanOne.Alchemy.Builder.FeSeqParam,System.String)
member.summary: Adds a parameter and its associated value to the DSL function.
member.param: The value associated with the parameter.
member.returns: The current DSL function instance for chaining.

member.name: M:SeanOne.Alchemy.Builder.FeSequenceFunc.Build
member.summary: Builds the DSL function into a instance.

member.name: T:SeanOne.Alchemy.Builder.FeDictParam
member.summary: Defines the parameter options used by IDictionaryAlchemyFunction (fe). Handles dictionary-specific DSL parameters and formatting logic.

member.name: F:SeanOne.Alchemy.Builder.FeDictParam.DictFormat
member.summary: Format string for dictionary entries. Use {0} to represent the key and {1} to represent the value. DSL param: dict-format.

member.name: F:SeanOne.Alchemy.Builder.FeDictParam.End
member.summary: Appends a string after each value. DSL param: end.

member.name: F:SeanOne.Alchemy.Builder.FeDictParam.ExcludeLastEnd
member.summary: Omits the end string after the last item. DSL param: exclude-last-end.

member.name: F:SeanOne.Alchemy.Builder.FeDictParam.FinalPairSeparator
member.summary: Replaces the separator between the last two items in the sequence. Falls back to `end` if not specified. DSL param: final-pair-separator.

member.name: F:SeanOne.Alchemy.Builder.FeDictParam.KeyFormat
member.summary: Format string applied to dictionary keys. DSL param: key-format.

member.name: F:SeanOne.Alchemy.Builder.FeDictParam.ValueFormat
member.summary: Format string applied to dictionary values. DSL param: value-format.

member.name: F:SeanOne.Alchemy.Builder.FeDictParam.Prefix
member.summary: Prepends a string before the sequence. Note: Adds to entire result, not each element. DSL param: prefix.

member.name: F:SeanOne.Alchemy.Builder.FeDictParam.Suffix
member.summary: Appends a string after the sequence. Note: Adds to entire result, not each element. DSL param: suffix.

member.name: F:SeanOne.Alchemy.Builder.FeDictParam.FeOpt
member.summary: Enable optimized formatting (may have compatibility issues). DSL param: fe-opt.

member.name: T:SeanOne.Alchemy.Builder.FeDictionaryFunc
member.summary: Implementation of IDictionaryAlchemyFunction using FeDictParam. Handles dictionary-specific DSL parameters and formatting logic.

member.name: M:SeanOne.Alchemy.Builder.FeDictionaryFunc.#ctor
member.summary: 初始化，先添加 fe

member.name: M:SeanOne.Alchemy.Builder.FeDictionaryFunc.With(SeanOne.Alchemy.Builder.FeDictParam,System.String)
member.summary: Adds a parameter and its associated value to the DSL function.
member.param: The value associated with the parameter.
member.returns: The current DSL function instance for chaining.

member.name: M:SeanOne.Alchemy.Builder.FeDictionaryFunc.Build
member.summary: Builds the DSL function into a instance.

member.name: T:SeanOne.Alchemy.Builder.IAlchemyFunction`1
member.summary: Generic base interface for DSL functions. Provides methods to configure parameters and build a DSL executable.
member.typeparam: The type of parameter used in the DSL function.

member.name: M:SeanOne.Alchemy.Builder.IAlchemyFunction`1.With(`0,System.String)
member.summary: Adds a parameter and its associated value to the DSL function.
member.param: The value associated with the parameter.
member.returns: The current DSL function instance for chaining.

member.name: M:SeanOne.Alchemy.Builder.IAlchemyFunction`1.Build
member.summary: Builds the DSL function into an executable instance.
member.returns: A representing the configured DSL function.

member.name: T:SeanOne.Alchemy.Builder.IBasicAlchemyFunction`1
member.summary: DSL function interface for basic operations. Inherits from .
member.typeparam: The type of parameter used in the DSL function.

member.name: T:SeanOne.Alchemy.Builder.ISequenceAlchemyFunction`1
member.summary: DSL function interface for sequence-based operations. Note: Internally relies on the same underlying DSL function fe as , but provided here for semantic distinction.
member.typeparam: The type of parameter used in the DSL function.

member.name: T:SeanOne.Alchemy.Builder.IDictionaryAlchemyFunction`1
member.summary: DSL function interface for dictionary-based operations. Note: Internally relies on the same underlying DSL function fe as , but provided here for semantic distinction.
member.typeparam: The type of parameter used in the DSL function.

member.name: M:SeanOne.Alchemy.AlchemyConverter.Convert(System.Object,System.String)
member.summary: Converts the specified object according to the provided DSL instruction.

member.name: M:SeanOne.Alchemy.AlchemyConverter.ConvertAsync(System.Object,System.String)
member.summary: Asynchronously converts the specified object according to the provided DSL instruction.

member.name: F:SeanOne.Alchemy.AlchemyConverter.s_ActionsSync
member.summary: 取得 Convert 相關的同步執行函數字典
member.remarks: 字典鍵值對應： - "cnv", "convert": 執行 CNV 轉換 - "fe", "foreach", "basic": 執行 AlchemyFormatter 格式化

member.name: F:SeanOne.Alchemy.AlchemyConverter.s_ActionsTemperature
member.summary:
溫度轉換指令與對應函數的映射字典 支援兩種指令格式:
"XtoY" 格式: 例如 "KtoC" (凱氏轉攝氏)、"FtoC" (華氏轉攝氏)
"X->Y" 格式: 例如 "K->C"、 "F->C"，使用箭頭符號增強可讀性
member.remarks: 字典使用 進行比較， 因此指令不區分大小寫 (例如 "ktoC"、"K->c" 皆可正確匹配)

member.name: M:SeanOne.Alchemy.AlchemyConverter.ConvertTemperature``1(``0,System.String)
member.summary: 統一泛型入口：轉換溫度數值或清單中的每個元素
member.typeparam: 輸入的型別，可以是數值型別或實作 IList 的集合型別
member.returns: 若輸入為數值，回傳轉換後的數值 (型別為 T) 若輸入為集合，回傳修改後的集合本身 (原地轉換)

member.name: T:SeanOne.Alchemy.Definitions.CommonParams
member.summary: 提供通用 DSL 參數名稱常數，適用於多種指令與格式化情境

member.name: F:SeanOne.Alchemy.Definitions.CommonParams.Begin
member.summary: 每個值之前附加的字串 DSL 參數: begin

member.name: F:SeanOne.Alchemy.Definitions.CommonParams.End
member.summary: 每個值之後附加的字串 DSL 參數: end

member.name: F:SeanOne.Alchemy.Definitions.CommonParams.Tostring
member.summary: 套用於實作 IFormattable 之物件的格式字串 DSL 參數: tostring

member.name: F:SeanOne.Alchemy.Definitions.CommonParams.Prefix
member.summary: 整個輸出結果之前附加的前綴字串 DSL 參數: prefix

member.name: F:SeanOne.Alchemy.Definitions.CommonParams.Suffix
member.summary: 整個輸出結果之後附加的後綴字串 DSL 參數: suffix

member.name: T:SeanOne.Alchemy.Definitions.FeParams
member.summary: 提供 FE 指令專用的參數名稱常數

member.name: F:SeanOne.Alchemy.Definitions.FeParams.FeOpt
member.summary: 啟用最佳化格式化模式 (可能影響相容性) DSL 參數: fe-opt

member.name: T:SeanOne.Alchemy.Definitions.IEnumerableParams
member.summary: 提供與 處理相關的 DSL 參數名稱常數

member.name: F:SeanOne.Alchemy.Definitions.IEnumerableParams.ExcludeLastEnd
member.summary: 是否排除最後一個項目的 end 字串 DSL 參數: exclude-last-end

member.name: F:SeanOne.Alchemy.Definitions.IEnumerableParams.FinalPairSeparator
member.summary: 用於取代最後兩個項目之間分隔符號的字串 (若未指定則使用 end) DSL 參數: final-pair-separator

member.name: T:SeanOne.Alchemy.Definitions.IDictionaryParams
member.summary: 提供與 處理相關的 DSL 參數名稱常數

member.name: F:SeanOne.Alchemy.Definitions.IDictionaryParams.DictFormat
member.summary: 定義字典項目的格式字串，可使用 {0} 代表索引鍵，{1} 代表值 DSL 參數: dict-format

member.name: F:SeanOne.Alchemy.Definitions.IDictionaryParams.KeyFormat
member.summary: 套用於字典索引鍵的格式字串 DSL 參數: key-format

member.name: F:SeanOne.Alchemy.Definitions.IDictionaryParams.ValueFormat
member.summary: 套用於字典值的格式字串 DSL 參數: value-format

member.name: T:SeanOne.Alchemy.Definitions.CnvParams
member.summary: 提供轉換 (Convert)相關指令的 DSL 參數名稱常數

member.name: F:SeanOne.Alchemy.Definitions.CnvParams.Sort
member.summary: 指定排序方式或排序參數 DSL 參數: sort

member.name: F:SeanOne.Alchemy.Definitions.CnvParams.Temp
member.summary: 暫時保留的參數，用於過渡或測試用途 DSL 參數: temp

member.name: T:SeanOne.Alchemy.Definitions.DslSymbols
member.summary: DSL 符號定義類別，集中管理 DSL 語法解析中使用的各種符號常數。

member.name: F:SeanOne.Alchemy.Definitions.DslSymbols.QuoteSymbol
member.summary: 引號符號，用於包裹字串值，標示其開始與結束。

member.name: F:SeanOne.Alchemy.Definitions.DslSymbols.ParamPrefix
member.summary: 參數前綴符號，用於標示 DSL 參數的起始。

member.name: F:SeanOne.Alchemy.Definitions.DslSymbols.ParamSeparator
member.summary: 參數分隔符號，用於分隔參數名稱與其對應的值。

member.name: T:SeanOne.Alchemy.Definitions.DslSyntaxBuilder
member.summary: DSL 語法建置工具類別， 提供建立參數鍵、添加參數值與符號處理等功能， 主要用於 DSL 語法解析的建置過程，並兼具部分通用性。

member.name: M:SeanOne.Alchemy.Definitions.DslSyntaxBuilder.AppendQuoted(System.Text.StringBuilder,System.String)
member.summary: 新增參數值

member.name: M:SeanOne.Alchemy.Definitions.DslSyntaxBuilder.AppendParam(System.Text.StringBuilder,System.String)
member.summary: 新增參數

member.name: M:SeanOne.Alchemy.Definitions.DslSyntaxBuilder.EscapeDslValue(System.String)
member.summary: 將可能導致解析錯誤的字元轉換為安全字元

member.name: M:SeanOne.Alchemy.Definitions.DslSyntaxBuilder.BuildParamKey(System.String)
member.summary: 建立 DSL 參數鍵

member.name: T:SeanOne.Alchemy.Utility.ConvertToUnicode
member.summary: 將指定輸入轉換成 Unicode 值 注意: 部分情況直接使用 C# 數值轉換更快更準，可能看似非標準 Unicode

member.name: M:SeanOne.Alchemy.Utility.ConvertToUnicode.DecodeUnicodeEscapes(System.String)
member.summary: 將字串中的所有 \uXXXX 轉義序列轉換為其對應的 Unicode 字符

member.name: M:SeanOne.Alchemy.Utility.ConvertToUnicode.Unescape(System.String)
member.summary: 將字串中的所有 \X 轉義序列轉換為其對應的 Unicode 字符

member.name: T:SeanOne.Alchemy.Utility.TemperatureConverter
member.summary: 轉換成不同常見溫標 注意: 不用第三方庫是因為這樣能更好的控制變量

member.name: M:SeanOne.Alchemy.Utility.TemperatureConverter.ThrowIfBelowAbsoluteZero(System.Double)
member.summary: 檢查是否低於絕對零度
member.exception: 凱氏溫度值低於絕對零度時拋出

member.name: M:SeanOne.Alchemy.Utility.TemperatureConverter.FtoK(System.Double)
member.summary: 華氏轉凱氏 (含絕對零度檢查)
member.exception: 轉換結果低於絕對零度時拋出

member.name: M:SeanOne.Alchemy.Utility.TemperatureConverter.FtoC(System.Double)
member.summary: 華氏轉攝氏 (含絕對零度檢查)
member.exception: 轉換結果低於絕對零度時拋出

member.name: M:SeanOne.Alchemy.Utility.TemperatureConverter.KtoF(System.Double)
member.summary: 凱氏轉華氏 (含絕對零度檢查)
member.exception: 輸入溫度低於絕對零度時拋出

member.name: M:SeanOne.Alchemy.Utility.TemperatureConverter.KtoC(System.Double)
member.summary: 凱氏轉攝氏 (含絕對零度檢查)
member.exception: 輸入溫度低於絕對零度時拋出

member.name: M:SeanOne.Alchemy.Utility.TemperatureConverter.CtoK(System.Double)
member.summary: 攝氏轉凱氏 (含絕對零度檢查)
member.exception: 轉換結果低於絕對零度時拋出

member.name: M:SeanOne.Alchemy.Utility.TemperatureConverter.CtoF(System.Double)
member.summary: 攝氏轉華氏 (含絕對零度檢查)
member.exception: 轉換結果低於絕對零度時拋出

member.name: M:SeanOne.Alchemy.Utility.TemperatureConverter.FtoK_Core(System.Double)
member.summary: 華氏轉凱氏 (純數學轉換，無檢查)

member.name: M:SeanOne.Alchemy.Utility.TemperatureConverter.FtoC_Core(System.Double)
member.summary: 華氏轉攝氏 (純數學轉換，無檢查)

member.name: M:SeanOne.Alchemy.Utility.TemperatureConverter.KtoF_Core(System.Double)
member.summary: 凱氏轉華氏 (純數學轉換，無檢查)

member.name: M:SeanOne.Alchemy.Utility.TemperatureConverter.KtoC_Core(System.Double)
member.summary: 凱氏轉攝氏 (純數學轉換，無檢查)

member.name: M:SeanOne.Alchemy.Utility.TemperatureConverter.CtoK_Core(System.Double)
member.summary: 攝氏轉凱氏 (純數學轉換，無檢查)

member.name: M:SeanOne.Alchemy.Utility.TemperatureConverter.CtoF_Core(System.Double)
member.summary: 攝氏轉華氏 (純數學轉換，無檢查)

member.name: T:SeanOne.Alchemy.Utility.ReflectionCloner
member.summary: 提供物件深度複製 (Deep Clone) 的工具類別 使用反射遞迴複製物件，支援陣列與巢狀物件，並避免循環參考

member.name: M:SeanOne.Alchemy.Utility.ReflectionCloner.DeepClone``1(``0)
member.summary: 深度複製物件
member.typeparam: 物件的型別，不需特別指定，編譯器會自動推斷
member.returns: 複製後的新物件，與原始物件內容相同但為不同參考

member.name: M:SeanOne.Alchemy.Utility.ReflectionCloner.DeepCloneInternal(System.Object,System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary{System.Object,System.Object})
member.summary: 深度複製的主體邏輯
member.param: 已經複製過的物件，用來避免循環參考

member.name: T:SeanOne.Alchemy.Utility.ReflectionCloner.ReferenceEqualityComparer
member.summary: 用來避免循環參考的比較器 使用物件的參考相等性 (ReferenceEquals) 來判斷是否為同一個物件

member.name: M:SeanOne.Alchemy.Utility.ReflectionCloner.ReferenceEqualityComparer.Equals(System.Object,System.Object)
member.summary: 判斷兩個物件是否為同一個參考
member.returns: 若為同一個參考則回傳 true，否則 false

member.name: M:SeanOne.Alchemy.Utility.ReflectionCloner.ReferenceEqualityComparer.GetHashCode(System.Object)
member.summary: 取得物件的雜湊碼，基於參考而非值

member.name: T:SeanOne.Alchemy.Utility.Get
member.summary: 取得 DSL 指令的值

member.name: M:SeanOne.Alchemy.Utility.Get.ExtractParameterValue(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: 從 dslInstruction 中提取參數的值
member.param: Dsl 指令(要被提取的字串)

member.name: M:SeanOne.Alchemy.Utility.Get.ParameterValueOrDefault(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: 取得參數值，如果未找到參數或參數為空，則傳回預設值
member.param: Dsl 指令(要被提取的字串)

member.name: M:SeanOne.Alchemy.Utility.Get.FindNextTerminator(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: 尋找下一個終止字元（空格或“/”）
member.param: Dsl 指令(要被查找的字串)

member.name: M:SeanOne.Alchemy.Utility.Get.ExtractDirective(System.String)
member.summary: 從 dslInstruction 中提取指令的名稱，最前面的那一個字串
member.param: Dsl 指令(要被提取的字串)，但本身必須要被Trim過一遍

member.name: T:SeanOne.Alchemy.Utility.Judge
member.summary: 判斷 DSL 條件

member.name: M:SeanOne.Alchemy.Utility.Judge.SafeToString(System.Object)
member.summary: 檢查物件是否實作 IFormattable 介面

member.name: M:SeanOne.Alchemy.Utility.Judge.HasString(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: 檢查 fullStr 是否包含 searchStr

member.name: M:SeanOne.Alchemy.Utility.Judge.ValidateSingleParameter(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: 檢查某個 參數 是否在 dslInstruction 中出現多次
member.param: Dsl 指令(要被檢查的字串)

member.name: M:SeanOne.Alchemy.Utility.Judge.CountParameterOccurrences(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: 計算 參數 在 dslInstruction 中出現的次數 (使用正則表達式)
member.param: Dsl 指令(要被檢查的字串)

member.name: M:SeanOne.Alchemy.Utility.Judge.ValidateCodeParameters(System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String}@)
member.summary: 根據方法類型驗證參數
member.param: Dsl 指令(要被檢查的字串)
要回傳的無效參數列表

member.name: M:SeanOne.Alchemy.Utility.Judge.ValidateCodeParametersAuto(System.String,System.Type,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String}@)
member.summary: 自動偵測方法類型並驗證參數
member.param: Dsl 指令(要被檢查的字串)
要回傳的無效參數列表

member.name: M:SeanOne.Alchemy.Utility.Judge.DetermineMethodType(System.Type)
member.summary: 根據物件類型自動判斷應該使用的方法

member.name: T:SeanOne.Alchemy.AlchemyFormatter
member.summary: Transforms objects into formatted strings using a simple DSL syntax.

member.name: M:SeanOne.Alchemy.AlchemyFormatter.Format(System.Object,System.String)
member.summary: Formats the specified object according to the provided DSL instruction.
member.exception: Thrown when is null or is null or empty.

member.name: M:SeanOne.Alchemy.AlchemyFormatter.FormatAsync(System.Object,System.String)
member.summary: Asynchronously formats the specified object according to the provided DSL instruction.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation.
member.exception: Thrown when is null or is null or empty.

member.name: M:SeanOne.Alchemy.AlchemyFormatter.Decoder(System.Object,System.String)
member.summary: 解碼並選擇適當的方法

member.name: M:SeanOne.Alchemy.AlchemyFormatter.FE(System.Object,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: 將 IEnumerable 轉換為字串
member.param: 呼叫時的指令名稱(僅用做 throw 時)

member.name: M:SeanOne.Alchemy.AlchemyFormatter.FE_ProcessDictionary(System.Collections.IDictionary,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: 處理字典集合
member.param: 每次跌代後加的字串(如果是倒數第二個且 final_pair_separator 為空字串，或是最後一個且 exclude_last_end 為 true，則不加)
用於倒數第二個與最後一個項目之間的連接字串
最前面的前綴，會加在整個字典處理結果的開頭(即使字典為空也會添加)
最後面的後綴，會加在整個字典處理結果的結尾(即使字典為空也會添加)
是否排除最後一個項目的 end 字串

member.name: M:SeanOne.Alchemy.AlchemyFormatter.FE_ProcessDictionary_Optimized(System.Collections.IDictionary,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: 處理字典集合 (優化過後)
member.param: 每次跌代後加的字串(如果是倒數第二個且 final_pair_separator 為空字串，或是最後一個且 exclude_last_end 為 true，則不加)
用於倒數第二個與最後一個項目之間的連接字串
最前面的前綴，會加在整個字典處理結果的開頭(即使字典為空也會添加)
最後面的後綴，會加在整個字典處理結果的結尾(即使字典為空也會添加)
是否排除最後一個項目的 end 字串

member.name: M:SeanOne.Alchemy.AlchemyFormatter.FE_ProcessEnumerable(System.Collections.IEnumerable,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: 處理普通集合
member.param: 指定集合的格式化方式
每次跌代後加的字串(如果是倒數第二個且 final_pair_separator 為空字串，或是最後一個且 exclude_last_end 為 true，則不加)
用於倒數第二個與最後一個項目之間的連接字串
最前面的前綴，會加在整個集合處理結果的開頭(即使集合為空也會添加)
最後面的後綴，會加在整個集合處理結果的結尾(即使集合為空也會添加)
是否排除最後一個項目的 end 字串

member.name: M:SeanOne.Alchemy.AlchemyFormatter.FE_ProcessEnumerable_Optimized(System.Collections.IEnumerable,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: 處理普通集合 (優化過後)
member.param: 指定集合的格式化方式
每次跌代後加的字串(如果是倒數第二個且 final_pair_separator 為空字串，或是最後一個且 exclude_last_end 為 true，則不加)
用於倒數第二個與最後一個項目之間的連接字串
最前面的前綴，會加在整個字典處理結果的開頭(即使字典為空也會添加)
最後面的後綴，會加在整個字典處理結果的結尾(即使字典為空也會添加)
是否排除最後一個項目的 end 字串

member.name: M:SeanOne.Alchemy.AlchemyFormatter.Basic(System.Object,System.String)
member.summary: 處理單個對象的格式化 (非同步)

member.name: F:SeanOne.Alchemy.AlchemyFormatter.s_ActionsSync
member.summary: 取得 Format 相關的同步執行函數字典
member.remarks: 字典鍵值對應： - "fe", "foreach": 執行 FE 函數（帶對應的類型參數） - "basic": 執行 Basic 函數

member.name: M:SeanOne.Alchemy.AlchemyFormatter.ValidateEnumerableFormattable(System.Collections.IEnumerable,System.String)
member.summary: 驗證集合元素是否可格式化

member.name: M:SeanOne.Alchemy.AlchemyFormatter.FormatObject(System.Object,System.String)
member.summary: 格式化對象 (需支持 IFormattable)

member.name: M:SeanOne.Alchemy.AlchemyFormatter.Dict_Format(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: 格式化字典

member.name: M:SeanOne.Alchemy.AlchemyResult.Convert(System.String)
member.summary: Converts the current source object according to the provided DSL instruction.

member.name: M:SeanOne.Alchemy.AlchemyResult.ConvertAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Asynchronously converts the specified object according to the provided DSL instruction.

member.name: M:SeanOne.Alchemy.AlchemyResult.Parse(System.Object)
member.summary: Creates a new instance of the AlchemyResult class from the specified object.
member.param: The source object to wrap in an AlchemyResult.
member.returns: A new AlchemyResult instance that represents the specified object.

member.name: M:SeanOne.Alchemy.AlchemyResult.TryParse(System.Object,SeanOne.Alchemy.AlchemyResult@)
member.summary: Attempts to convert the specified object to an AlchemyResult without throwing an exception.
member.param: The source object to wrap in an AlchemyResult. This parameter can be null.
When this method returns, contains the AlchemyResult representation of the object if the conversion succeeded; otherwise, null.
member.returns: true if the object was successfully converted to an AlchemyResult; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:SeanOne.Alchemy.AlchemyConverterExpansions.GetList``1(SeanOne.Alchemy.AlchemyResult,System.Func{System.Object,System.Int32,``0})
member.summary: 將結果中的集合轉換為 List，使用自訂的轉換器。
member.param: 轉換委託，接收元素物件和索引，傳回轉換後的 T

member.name: T:SeanOne.Alchemy.AlchemyResultTaskExtensions
member.summary: Provides extension methods for the class.

member.name: M:SeanOne.Alchemy.AlchemyResultTaskExtensions.ConvertAsync(System.Threading.Tasks.Task{SeanOne.Alchemy.AlchemyResult},System.String)
member.summary: Asynchronously converts the specified object according to the provided DSL instruction.
member.param: The task that contains the source object to convert.

members.member: 轉換為對象 (非同步版本)

member.name: M:SeanOne.Alchemy.Sorting.Sort.Entry``1(``0,System.String)
member.summary: 排序入口方法，根據傳入的指令對物件進行排序
member.typeparam: 物件的型別，實際上未使用，僅用於泛型推斷

member.name: T:SeanOne.Alchemy.Sorting.SortCommands
member.summary: 提供排序命令的靜態映射，將命令字串與具體的排序實作連結

member.name: F:SeanOne.Alchemy.Sorting.SortCommands.s_ListSorterActions
member.summary: 存放所有 IList 可以成功排序的參數 鍵 (Key) 為命令字串 (如 "bs", "bubble") 值 (Value) 為對應的排序動作委託，接受 IList 參數並直接修改該清單
member.remarks: 所有命令字串均不區分大小寫，建議使用小寫以保持一致

member.name: M:SeanOne.Alchemy.Sorting.SortExpansions.Swap(System.Collections.IList,System.Int32,System.Boolean@)
member.summary: 交換 中指定索引與前一個索引的元素，並將 設為 true
member.param: 要進行交換的 集合
要交換的後一個元素索引 (與索引 index-1 的元素交換)
參考的布林值，方法執行後會被設為 true，表示交換已發生
member.remarks: 此方法假設 大於等於 1 且小於 的 Count，呼叫者需確保索引有效 主要用於排序演算法 (如氣泡排序) 內部，以簡化交換邏輯
